name: Add Two Numbers
description: Given two non-empty linked lists representing two non-negative integers stored in reverse order (each node is a single digit), add the two numbers and return the sum as a linked list.
constraints: The number of nodes in each list is in [1, 100]. 0 <= Node.val <= 9. Numbers do not contain leading zeros except the number 0 itself.

performance.stress_intent: exercise long carry chains that punish repeated place-value rescans instead of one linear digit-by-digit addition pass
